rulings.Case Title: ROBERT WILSON VS. MANFRED ANGSTENBERGER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday December 8, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT MANFRED ANGSTENBERGER, SHEILA ANGSTENBERGER DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the second cause of action for negligence per se to be re-alleged as part of other tort causes of action. Demurrer to the cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress is sustained without leave to amend - no substantive opposition. Demurrer is overruled as to the fourth and fifth causes of action for breaches of implied covenants - these causes of action a properly alleged as separate and distinct from breach of express contractual provisions. Demurrer to the habitability tort cause of action is overruled as it is properly plead in the alternative. Demurrer to retaliation and malicious prosecution causes of action is overruled - these causes of action is sufficiently alleged. Demurrer to the breach of contract re: waiver of rent is overruled - not duplicative. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. JOAQUIN SHAW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Set Aside Default Judgment; Memo Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Attorney Fault In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday December 8, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT JOAQUIN SHAW Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Set Aside Default Judgment DENIED. The Court finds that "default ¿was not in fact caused by the attorney's mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or neglect." (CCP 473(b)). Per Alissa de Vogel Declaration paragraph 5, counsel has made a mistaken determination as to the nature of the summons and complaint on October 19, 2015 when she saw the documents brought in by Defendant. Default and default judgment were entered on October 14, 2015. Therefore, the attorney's mistake made on October 19, 2015 did not cause the entry of judgment on October 14, 2015. = (501/REQ)
